flags.label: Percentage-typed
flags.desc: is_percentage = TRUE — this rate is a percentage, not a dollar. Served as $ it would be poison; the serve excludes it.

flags.label: Quality-flagged
flags.desc: data_quality_flag ≠ 0 — Aetna's OWN quality marker on this row (the file flags it, not us).

flags.label: Per-diem rate
flags.desc: negotiated_type = 'per diem' — a per-day rate, not a per-service unit price.

flags.label: Derived rate
flags.desc: is_derived = TRUE — Aetna computed this rate rather than directly negotiating it.

flags.label: Modified rate
flags.desc: a billing modifier is present (TC/26/52/53/…) — a partial/technical rate, not the global procedure price.

flags.label: Zero-dollar
flags.desc: rate_cents = 0 — $0 (bundled / not separately payable); the absence of a charge, not a bargain.

flags.label: Sub-$1 placeholder
flags.desc: 0 < rate ≤ $1 — a placeholder value; the serve excludes it via the penny-gap test.
